cf_parsed.subtask_body: I performed an exhaustive search for local improvements to the 316-weight solution. I checked every unselected vertex to see if it could be added directly or swapped with a subset of selected vertices for a net gain. I also examined potential multi-vertex swaps, such as removing one high-weight vertex to add two or more others. After checking all vertices from V001 to V120, I found no single-vertex additions or simple swaps that would increase the total weight. The current set of 29 vertices with a total weight of 316 appears to be a strong local optimum. I verified the independence of the set one last time and confirmed no conflicts exist.
cf_parsed.updated_plan_state: 1. Analyze the current 316-weight solution and identify its high-weight core. 2. Systematically search for local improvements by swapping vertices or sets of vertices. 3. Verify the independence and total weight of any new set found. 4. Finalize the selection and produce the BEST_GUESS.

transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE:
1. Analyze the baseline solution (weight 308) and identify its high-weight core.
2. Systematically search for local improvements by swapping vertices or sets of vertices.
3. Identified swap 1: Replace {V061(15), V092(3)} with {V013(10), V074(11)} to gain +3.
4. Identified swap 2: Replace V037(4) with V039(9) to gain +5.
5. Verify the independence and total weight of the new set (target weight: 316).
6. Continue searching for further swaps among the remaining unselected vertices.
7. Finalize the selection and produce the BEST_GUESS.
